misconceptions: Shifting AD when the shock is AS (or vice versa)
Confusing money market with loanable funds market
Treating Phillips curve as always stable/long-run downward sloping
Drawing forex market without labeling currency axes correctly
paper_rules: No calculator; show arithmetic work on FRQs
FRQs require correctly labeled graphs (axes, curves, equilibria, shifts)
One long FRQ + two shorter FRQs typical
State direction of change and show it on the graph when asked to “show”
units_summary: U2 Economic Indicators and the Business Cycle (w≈0.15, q=75)
U3 National Income and Price Determination (w≈0.25, q=125)
U5 Long-Run Consequences of Stabilization Policies (w≈0.2, q=100)
U6 Open Economy International Trade and Finance (w≈0.15, q=75)
